new_handling: Implemented explicit canonical temperature admissibility via boundary exclusions (4K,30K), forced high-T remove (34K), and high-T width/peak/amplitude exclusion rule before acceptance metrics.

Restricted acceptance sweep to canonical-equivalent perturbations only: I_peak {max_sample,max_parabolic_local}, width {fwhm_linear,fwhm_nearest,fwhm_fine_interp}, S_peak {max_sample,max_parabolic_local}.
Replaced legacy hardcoded input with TRUSTED_CANONICAL run selection from tables/switching_run_trust_classification.csv and canonical S_long loading.
Replaced variant-dependent coordinate sweep with fixed canonical coordinate handling for acceptance metrics (single fixed scale mode).
